name: Accounts v2: user/org/project with org-level keys
objective: Restructure the accounts plane to an explicit user → org → project model: signup auto-provisions a "default" org and "default" project; API keys become mintable at org level (making today's de-facto tenant-wide enforcement honest); project resolution is get-or-create by name; knowledge save keeps the repo-basename default with a --project override and "default" fallback. Org creation + member invites stay out of scope (deferred).

review.note: All four intent bullets delivered and live on prod (S5 Stage B E2E green); validation green across root/gated/web/CLI/parity; docs consolidated into 11 versions; two non-blocking follow-ups routed to deferred jobs
